summary: Drag and reorder functionality on dashboard cards is WORKING CORRECTLY. All features tested: edit mode toggle, drag handles visibility, card dragging, order change detection, save layout, and localStorage persistence. User's report of 'drag not working' could not be reproduced - functionality works as expected.

issues: IDBDatabase NotFoundError in console (doesn't affect functionality)
Error polling notifications: Failed to fetch (cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: DraggableDashboard.jsx correctly implements @dnd-kit/core with PointerSensor (5px activation distance) and TouchSensor (200ms delay)
SortableCard component (lines 25-71) properly attaches drag listeners to the grip handle div
Card grip handles appear at line 44-62 with proper cursor-grab class and purple gradient styling
VIP banner correctly locked with cursor-not-allowed and Lock icon
localStorage persistence works correctly with key 'dashboard_card_order'
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag and reorder feature fully verified working. Test setup: Set localStorage 'tutorial_completed'='true', 'profile_popup_skipped'=timestamp, remove 'dashboard_card_order'. Login, scroll down ~900px to see cards, click gear icon (data-testid='edit-dashboard-btn'), drag purple handles on cards. 8 drag handles found (7 cursor-grab + 1 cursor-not-allowed for VIP banner). Order persists in localStorage after save.

Edit_Mode_Button_Tests.gear_icon_visible: PASSED - Edit button (gear icon) visible with data-testid='edit-dashboard-btn'
Edit_Mode_Button_Tests.click_enters_edit_mode: PASSED - Clicking gear button shows edit mode control panel

Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.panel_visible: PASSED - Edit mode panel appears with data-testid='edit-mode-panel'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.instruction_banner: PASSED - Purple banner shows 'Cards drag करा आणि reorder करा'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.save_button: PASSED - 'Layout Save करा' button with data-testid='save-layout-btn'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.reset_button: PASSED - 'Default वर Reset करा' button with data-testid='reset-layout-btn'

Drag_Handle_Tests.handles_visible: PASSED - 8 drag handles found (7 draggable + 1 locked VIP banner)
Drag_Handle_Tests.handles_position: PASSED - Handles positioned at left-2 top-2 on each card
Drag_Handle_Tests.cursor_style: PASSED - cursor-grab class applied to draggable handles

Card_Reordering_Tests.drag_operation: PASSED - Cards successfully reorder when dragged
Card_Reordering_Tests.save_button_activation: PASSED - Save button becomes enabled (purple) after reordering

Save_Layout_Tests.save_persists: PASSED - Layout saved to localStorage with key 'dashboard_card_order'
Save_Layout_Tests.toast_notification: PASSED - Shows 'Layout Save करा ✓' toast on save

Persistence_Tests.order_after_reload: PASSED - Order persists after page reload
Persistence_Tests.localStorage_read: PASSED - Component correctly reads saved order from localStorage on mount

VIP_Banner_Lock_Tests.lock_icon_visible: PASSED - VIP banner shows gray lock icon instead of purple drag handle
VIP_Banner_Lock_Tests.cannot_drag: PASSED - VIP banner card has cursor-not-allowed class
